description: CompositionBlack T-shirt with set-in sleeves, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careHand wash separately inside outDo not dry clean or bleachDry flat on reverse in shadeIron on reverseDress freaky this winter party season in this psychedellic print T-shirt from probase.
